title: Create agent folders
description: Create agent discovery folders in the export destination. When disabled, skill folders are written directly to the export destination.

title: Create .agents/skills
description: Create the shared .agents/skills folder used by Cursor, OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, and other agents that support the open Agent Skills location.

title: Preserve folder hierarchy
description: Keep Supernova skill folders as category folders in the exported output. When disabled, skills are flattened and duplicate names receive numeric suffixes.

title: Include Supernova metadata
description: Add Supernova metadata to the SKILL.md frontmatter.

title: Include updated timestamp
description: Add the Supernova skill update timestamp to frontmatter metadata.

title: Include generator name
description: Add the Supernova generator name to frontmatter metadata.

title: Include generated file disclaimer
description: Add a generated-file disclaimer to frontmatter metadata.

default: This file was generated by Supernova.io and should not be changed manually.
title: Disclaimer message
description: Disclaimer text written to the supernova-disclaimer frontmatter metadata field.
